Strong Rivals |desc={{p|Hatterene}} is Bede's first known Pokémon. She was first used as a {{p|Hatenna}} to shatter a large boulder blocking the [[Galar Mine]], allowing Bede to collect three [[Wishing Star]]s. She evolved into a {{p|Hattrem}} sometime during Bede's training with [[Opal]] and later into Hatterene while protecting [[Rose]] from {{p|Eternatus}}. She is capable of [[Gigantamax]]ing. Hatterene's known moves are {{m|Confusion}} and {{m|Dazzling Gleam}}.
As a Gigantamax Hatterene, it can use {{m|G-Max Smite}}.}} {{anchor|Rapidash 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Bede |pkmn=Rapidash |stage1=Ponyta |type1=Psychic |type2=Fairy |img=Bede Ponyta Adventures.png |img_size=170px |img2=Bede Rapidash Adventures.png |img2_size=150px |epnum=PASS10 |epname=Blazing!! Bede's Feelings |desc=A {{rf|Galarian}} {{p|Rapidash}} is Bede's second known Pokémon. It was first used as a {{p|Ponyta}} to attack [[Henry Sword|Henry]], but was defeated by his {{p|Gurdurr|Steeler}}. It evolved into a Rapidash sometime during Bede's training with [[Opal]]. Rapidash's known moves are {{m|Fairy Wind}} and {{m|Agility}}.}}
